overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in Western attire walking through a dense pine forest with tall grass under stormy overcast skies. The character encounters a moose before ascending a rocky hillside trail.

events.description: large moose with antlers emerges from the right tree line

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass in a forested valley with rocky outcrops on the left

entered.detail: dense forest of tall evergreen trees surrounding the meadow
tall green grass covering the forest floor
large gray rock outcrop on the left side of the path
hazy mountain range visible through the trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide grassy meadow surrounded by dense pine forest under overcast skies. Large rock formations line the left side of the path while distant mountains are visible through the trees. The atmosphere is calm and natural with tall grass swaying as the character moves forward.

events.description: moose walks past the character and moves away into the forest

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as a large moose passes by on the right side

notable_agents.action: large moose with antlers walking past the character and away into the trees

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk lying on the ground to the right

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a large moose with prominent antlers emerges from the right and walks past before heading deeper into the forest. The setting remains a grassy pine forest with scattered rocks and fallen logs, maintaining the wilderness atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail in pine forest

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to rocky terrain as character ascends
small wooden cabin becomes visible in the distant tree line

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill on a rocky path through the pine forest

entered.detail: small wooden structure visible through the trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending a hillside where the terrain transitions from grassy meadow to rocky ground with large stone formations. The path becomes steeper and rockier underfoot. In the distance, a small wooden cabin becomes visible through the dense pine trees as the character progresses up the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene pine forest that gradually transitions into a steep, rocky ascent. It begins with the character walking through a wide grassy meadow flanked by dense trees and large rock formations under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, a large moose with prominent antlers emerges from the right and crosses the path before disappearing back into the wilderness. The scene then shifts as the terrain transforms from soft grass to rugged stone, with the path becoming steeper and more rocky underfoot. Finally, the camera continues its climb up the hillside, revealing a small wooden cabin nestled among the distant pine trees.
